evals.prompt: Write a blog post about API rate limiting best practices for our developer documentation
evals.expected_output: A well-structured blog post in English about API rate limiting, with SEO elements (title, meta description, headings, keyword integration)

evals.prompt: 帮我们写一篇关于devpilot的博客，主要想让更多人知道我们这个工具
evals.expected_output: A Chinese blog post about devpilot, with keyword research targeting relevant Chinese search terms, natural product mentions

evals.prompt: 我想给我们的产品写几篇博客提高SEO，但不知道写什么好
evals.expected_output: Topic exploration: should read project context, suggest 3-5 topic angles with reasoning, and ask user to pick before writing
